## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m compileall src tests`
- [ ] `pytest -q tests/test_autonomous_stability.py`
- [ ] `pytest -q tests/test_setup_wizard.py`
- [ ] `npm run build` in `monitoring-dashboard/` when dashboard files changed

## Checklist

- [ ] docs updated when behavior or commands changed
- [ ] compatibility impact reviewed
- [ ] release note impact reviewed
- [ ] screenshots attached for UI changes when relevant
